title: Course: COSC 251 - Introduction to Data Science
description: Introduces computer use for analysis, interpretation and visualization of simple and complex, high-volume, high-dimensional and structured/unstructured data from varying sources using data analysis, modeling, data mining, data visualization and search techniques.
prerequisites_text: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 251 - Introduction to Data Science
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: Fall, Spring

Description: Introduces computer use for analysis, interpretation and visualization of simple and complex, high-volume, high-dimensional and structured/unstructured data from varying sources using data analysis, modeling, data mining, data visualization and search techniques.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Group A
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group A

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55579
